title: Update Metrics Analyst Summary Card Icons and Labels
story: As a DataTools Pro user viewing Metrics Analyst results, I want each summary card to have a distinct, meaningful icon, so that I can visually differentiate the categories at a glance.
description:
Update the icons on the Metrics Analyst summary cards to be distinct and meaningful for each category:

- Dashboards Processed
- Reports Processed
- Dashboard Widgets
- Suggested Metrics
- Ignored Facts
- Suggested Categories
acceptance_criteria: Each of the six summary cards has a unique, category-appropriate icon
Icons are visually consistent in size and style
Card labels match the specified names
ux_changes: Updated all six Metrics Analyst summary card icons to distinct, category-appropriate Bootstrap icons.
comment_summary: Developer completed the icon updates on staging.
